title: Tetrion All Purpose Ready Mixed Filler 600g
features: HIGH QUALITY FINISH: The original ready mixed filler ideal for all plaster repairs, ensuring smooth finishes suitable for both interior and exterior surfaces
VERSATILE APPLICATION: This compound works efficiently on concrete, wood fill, and wall plaster, providing a reliable surface preparation for various DIY projects
USER-FRIENDLY: Easy to use and ideal for home repairs, offering chemical safety, while providing robust wall protection against wear and tear
LONG-LASTING DURABILITY: Formulated with a strong polymer that guarantees enduring adhesion to diverse surfaces, including concrete and wall structures
COMPLETE CARE & REPAIR: Efficiently fills gaps and cracks, maintaining your home or workplace's structural integrity, ensuring safety and aesthetics
description: Product Description The Tetrion brand is one of the most recognisable names within the professional trade market over the last 40+ years. At its launch in the early 1970’s Tetrion changed the filler market with the innovation of the first ‘All Purpose Filler’. With Fillers, Adhesives, Decorating Sundries, and much more, Tetrion covers every aspect of modern household decorating, attracting new tradespeople and DIY enthusiasts with its reputation as one of, if not the best homecare range on the market. Tetrion All Purpose Filler Ready Mixed 600g Tetrion All Purpose Ready Mixed Filler is our most versatile ready mixed filler. Suitable for interior and exterior repairs, Tetrion All Purpose Ready Mixed Filler seals and fills most household materials including plaster, wood, stone, concrete, brickwork, and metal. Water and weather resistant (when overpainted with oil-based paint when fully set) Drillable, tappable, and over-paintable Resistant to vibration, shrinking, sagging, and cracking Resilient to expansion and contraction Highly versatile - suitable for multiple surface applications Ready mixed for convenience for quick repair jobs - no dosing or mixed required Super smooth, easy and quick to sand High strength polymer re-enforced Ready to seal and fill most household materials including plaster, wood, stone, concrete, and brickwork High strength formulation, once set it can be drilled, painted, plugged, grinded, etc. Highly versatile, resistant to vibration, shrinking, sagging and cracking, for use inside and out Ready to use mixed for convenience for quick repair jobs Directions for use: 1. Ensure all surfaces are dry, clean and free from loose material 2. If required, stir before use and add a few drops of water to improve workability 3. Apply with a filling knife and smooth off immediately with a wet blade 4. Setting occurs in approximately 4-6 hours depending on depth of fill and atmospheric conditions. After 24 hours filler can be sanded and then overpainted with most household paints 5. Over paint with an oil-based paint when used externally. prime with a suitable sealer when overpainting with a water-based paint After use: Replace plastic disc and lid to ensure remaining filler stays in good condition. Advice: Tetrion All Purpose Ready Mix Filler should be applied in layers of no less than 3mm and no greater than 10mm to ensure adhesion. Tetrion All Purpose Ready Mix Filler can be drilled or tapped provided that the depth of the set filler is at least equal to that of the screw/plug. Under long term storage, product may separate slightly, if this is the case, stir before use. Important: Do not use in wet or damp conditions or use on surfaces regularly underwater. Do not sandwich between layers of paint and/or sealants.
